title: Premier Housewares Stainless Steel Saucepan Set, 3 Piece Set with Glass Lids
features: Cook wonderful meals with this pan set constructed from durable stainless steel
The three saucepan set comes with glass lids that feature a steam vent
Suitable for all hob types except induction
Care instructions: dishwasher safe or hand wash with hot, soapy water
Saucepans diameter: Ø 16cm (1.2 ltr), Ø 18cm (1.6 ltr), Ø 20cm (2 ltr)
description: Product Description Fantastic for your kitchen or as a gift, the 3pc stainless steel saucepan set would make a stylish and practical addition to your kitchen. Containing a 16cm, 18cm and 20cm saucepan, no cooking task will overwhelm you. Cooking everyday can be tough on your average cookware, but this 3pc cookware set ensures durability isnt an issue and with a mirror finish you get a new stylish look to your cookware. Ideal for cooking meats, vegetables, pasta, soups and sauces, the saucepans are versatile for your cooking needs. Stainless steel handles are solidly attached giving confidence when lifting hot pans. A glass lid allows you to look at your meal simmering away without removing the lid. Suitable for all hob types excluding induction and dishwasher safe, the 3pc set would be a great addition to the pots and pans set other than your non-stick kitchen accessories. Premier Housewares offers a wide, varied selection of kitchen accessories designed for any home. They are easy to clean and durable for everyday use. (paragraph break).The Premier Kitchen portfolio is a comprehensive range of coordinating products for the kitchen and dining area, featuring contemporary, functional products, as well as traditional, practical pieces. From dinner sets and glassware to knife sets and chopping boards, Premier has something to suit every style and budget. Create an efficient and practical kitchen area with Premier’s collection of storage solutions, preparation utensils, and tableware, cookware and kitchen accessories. Box Contains 3 x Premier Housewares Stainless Steel Saucepans
